slides.title: Executive summary
slides.body: Sarah Chen presents as a hiring profile centered on Senior ML Engineer · Transformer architectures, Instruction tuning from San Francisco, CA. Grounded evidence suggests about 5.0 year(s) of experience across 6 structured role(s). Top strengths: Technical leadership for small ML teams, mentorship, and cross-functional delivery; Research communication, publication writing, and experiment-driven iteration. Primary watchout: Scope and impact of production ML systems beyond daily prediction volume not explicitly quantified.
